channel.title: Deployment on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Deployment on Pi Stack

item.title: Apache Tomcat vs WildFly vs Gunicorn: Self-Hosted Application Servers 2026
item.description: When deploying web applications on your own infrastructure, choosing the right application server is critical. The application server sits between your code and the network, handling HTTP requests, managing connections, and executing your application logic. Three of the most widely used open-source options are Apache Tomcat, WildFly, and Gunicorn — each serving different ecosystems and use cases.

item.title: Argo Rollouts vs Flagger vs Spinnaker: Best Progressive Delivery Tools 2026
item.description: Progressive delivery has replaced traditional blue-green and canary deployments as the standard for releasing software safely in production. Instead of flipping a switch and hoping for the best, progressive delivery tools automatically shift traffic between old and new versions while monitoring key metrics — rolling back instantly if something goes wrong.
